Records.description: Tardigrade family, tardigrade_L4_massless-internal-offshell-external. Nonplanar Calabi-Yau bestiary graph at even loop order L, with 2(L+1) MASSLESS propagators (arXiv:1810.07689). X-cell ladder body with open corners left + apex right; phi^4-marginal decoration, degree-keyed after co-vertex collapse: 3 off-shell legs (both left corners + apex) + 2 massless legs (the apex-adjacent rail column); 5 effective legs at every L (figure-pinned, notes/families_core_batch/bestiary_pinning.md). Saturates the maximal rigidity 2(L-1) (checked through 11 loops). The massive-internal L=2 variant (arXiv:2209.10962, arXiv:2302.14840, a K3 surface of Picard rank 11) is a separate config of the same topology; the all-massless decoration is IR-divergent and not a member.
